title: Telipogon alexii
taxonomy: Telipogon alexii is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Telipogon, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is further classified as being part of the order Asparagales. This order is within the monocot clade of flowering plants. The classification can be summarized as: Telipogon alexii (species) > Telipogon (genus) > Orchidaceae (family) > Asparagales (order) > Monocots (clade).
